proposal.summary: Implement focused hiding runtime behavior using HideSpot interactables and HidingGaugeUI.
out_of_scope: Full monster AI pathfinding and search behavior

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends HidingRuntimeSystem.

current_state: Completed. HideSpot interactables enter hiding, HidingGaugeUI displays capture gauge state, and capture pressure can fire event_player_captured.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for MonsterRuntimeSystem only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start MonsterRuntimeSystem to drive capture pressure, monster states, and MonsterOverlay presentation.
